medications: Naproxen 250 mg as needed for back pain
Omeprazole 20 mg daily during NSAID use
Cyclobenzaprine 5 mg at night as needed for muscle spasm
health.mental_health: Manages chronic stress and hypervigilance from keeping their sexual orientation private in a conservative community; occasional anxiety and sleep disruption, avoids discussing personal relationships with their primary care doctor for fear of gossip.
recent_visits: Physiotherapy session at a clinic in Colonia Narvarte for back pain (last month)
Primary care visit for reflux symptoms and medication review (2 months ago)
Orthopedic consult for recurrent sciatica and posture/ergonomics recommendations (earlier this year)

finance.income_range: MXN $18,000–$26,000 per month (net, including occasional tutoring)
finance.debt: Carrying credit card balance from unexpected medical expenses (physiotherapy and imaging) and replacing a broken laptop used for lesson planning; paying minimums some months to avoid family questions about spending.
investments: CETES (small monthly purchases via government platform)
recent_transactions: Private physiotherapy package (6 sessions) paid by card
Pharmacy purchase: naproxen, omeprazole, topical analgesic
Cash withdrawal before meeting friends to avoid leaving a digital trail
Payment to a confidential counseling service (telehealth) under a generic billing name

relationships: Mother (Reina Desai) who is active in a conservative church circle and expects Skyler to present as heterosexual
Older sibling (Rohan Desai) who lives in Puebla and frequently asks about dating/marriage
Two trusted friends from university (Mariana López and Iván Salgado) who know Skyler is queer and provide emotional support
A discreet romantic interest (a woman named Sofía) whom Skyler sees privately and does not introduce to family or coworkers
social.social_media_activity: Keeps Facebook mostly for school announcements and family-friendly posts; avoids tagging locations and rarely posts photos. Uses Instagram with a small private account for art and city walks, and uses strict privacy settings; avoids any content that could reveal dating life.
private_conversations: Discussing how to stay safe and discreet while dating in a conservative neighborhood
Venting about fear of being outed at school by parents or coworkers
Planning cover stories for weekend plans to avoid questions about who they are with
Talking with a friend about whether to seek legal advice if workplace discrimination occurs

schedule.work_hours: Mon–Fri 7:15–15:30 (classroom time plus supervision); lesson planning/grading 19:30–21:00 several nights per week
regular_appointments: Physiotherapy for back pain every Wednesday at 18:30
Monthly check-in call with AFORE/CETES budgeting reminder on the first Sunday evening
Telehealth counseling session every other Monday at 21:30 (scheduled late for privacy)
upcoming_events: Weekend visit to mother in Iztapalapa (planned as a daytime visit only)
schedule.daily_routine: Leaves early to avoid crowded transport, uses a lumbar support cushion in class, keeps evenings quiet for planning and stretching exercises; schedules personal calls late at night to reduce the chance of being overheard at home.

professional.company: Public primary school under SEP (Secretaría de Educación Pública) in Mexico City (Zona Escolar in the east of the city)
projects: Reading comprehension intervention group for 3rd graders
Preparation of materials for a school-wide civics and values week
Creating low-cost science activities aligned with SEP curriculum
professional.performance_issues: Occasional absences or reduced energy during severe back pain weeks; avoids social staff gatherings and personal questions, which some colleagues interpret as being distant. Carefully manages boundaries to prevent rumors about personal life.
workplace_relationships: Friendly but cautious rapport with the school director (Directora Herrera), who is known to be traditional
Close collaboration with the special education support teacher (Mtra. Paola García) who helps with the reading intervention group
Keeps interactions with a gossip-prone coworker (Profr. Salinas) strictly professional to avoid personal scrutiny

hobbies: Walking in Chapultepec on quieter weekday afternoons
Watercolor sketching of city streets and markets
Listening to podcasts (education, history, and LGBTQ+ topics via headphones)
Cooking simple Indian-Mexican fusion meals at home
Attending occasional museum exhibits (Museo Tamayo, Bellas Artes) alone or with a trusted friend
habits: Daily stretching and short core exercises for back pain management
Uses a privacy screen on phone and disables lock-screen notifications
Keeps a separate, password-protected messaging app for private conversations
Avoids being seen in certain neighborhoods or venues where acquaintances might recognize them
Limits alcohol because it worsens sleep and reflux
lifestyle.living_situation: Rents a modest one-bedroom apartment in a middle-income area of Mexico City; keeps home life low-profile and rarely hosts visitors to avoid neighbor speculation. Family assumes Skyler is simply 'busy with work.'
lifestyle.dietary_preferences: Tries to eat anti-inflammatory, reflux-friendly meals (less fried food and spicy salsas on weeknights), brings homemade lunch to school to save money; drinks coffee only in the morning.
